speaker: narrator
line: Just before I was leaving, the old lady came up to my room and said in a very hysterical way:

speaker: old landlady
line: Must you go? Oh! young Herr, must you go?

speaker: old landlady
line: It is the eve of St. George's Day. Do you not know that to-night, when the clock strikes midnight, all the evil things in the world will have full sway?

speaker: narrator
line: She was in such evident distress that I tried to comfort her, but without effect.
